findings.detail: Only 1 template choice, so it feels like there’s hardly any design control.
findings.proposed_solution: Offer a few more template options so I can pick a look that fits my business.

findings.detail: The palette options are very limited, which makes the editor feel a bit boxed in.
findings.proposed_solution: Show more color palette choices or a simple way to customize colors.

findings.detail: The chat box is present, but after sending text it looks like nothing stays there, which can feel awkward.
findings.proposed_solution: Make the chat interaction feel more responsive by showing the message after I send it.

findings.detail: The template switch area was skipped because there was only one chip, so the experience feels incomplete.
findings.proposed_solution: If there’s only one template, hide the template switch area or replace it with clearer design guidance.

warnings.detail: Only 1 template choice, so it feels like there’s hardly any design control.
The palette options are very limited, which makes the editor feel a bit boxed in.
The chat box is present, but after sending text it looks like nothing stays there, which can feel awkward.
The template switch area was skipped because there was only one chip, so the experience feels incomplete.
